mapper.select: SELECT id, status, total_price FROM ORDERS WHERE id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( order_id, coupon_id, method, amount, card_company, payment_time, payment_status, pg_transaction_id, point_used, point_earned ) VALUES ( #{payment.orderId}, #{payment.couponId}, #{payment.method}, #{payment.amount}, #{payment.cardCompany}, NOW(), '승인', #{pgId}, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.receipt_no AS receiptNo, o.waiting_no AS waitingNo, o.total_price AS totalPrice, DATE_FORMAT( o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS orderTime, p.method AS paymentMethod, p.card_company AS cardCompany FROM ORDERS o LEFT JOIN PAYMENT p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT m.name AS menuName, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS price FROM ORDERITEM oi JOIN ORDERITEMMENU oim ON oi.id = oim.order_item_id JOIN MENU m ON oim.menu_id = m.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.id, oim.id
